options.content:
Linkerd · service mesh overview
Data plane & control plane golden metrics, straight from the proxies — zero app instrumentation

targets.expr: sum(rate(response_total{namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound", deployment=~"$workload", pod=~"$pod", classification="success"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(response_total{namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound", deployment=~"$workload", pod=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)

sum(rate(request_total{namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound", deployment=~"$workload", pod=~"$pod", tls="true"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(request_total{namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound", deployment=~"$workload", pod=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)

sum(rate(response_total{namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound", deployment="http-server", deployment=~"$workload", pod=~"$pod", classification="success"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(response_total{namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound", deployment="http-server", deployment=~"$workload", pod=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum(rate(response_latency_ms_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound", deployment="http-server", deployment=~"$workload", pod=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(response_latency_ms_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound", deployment="http-server", deployment=~"$workload", pod=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(response_latency_ms_bucket{namespace=~"$namespace", direction="inbound", deployment="http-server", deployment=~"$workload", pod=~"$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (le))
